mnemonics.title: 2PL Phases
mnemonics.content: Grow Before You Shrink: Growing phase (acquire locks) must complete before shrinking phase (release locks) begins.

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a table: Rows=Existing Locks, Columns=Requested Locks. Shared locks (S) allow S-S overlap, Exclusive (X) blocks everything.

analogies.analogy: Like customers taking numbered tickets at a deli counter - lower numbers get served first.
